data.name: Rewind Desires
data.detailed_description:
Rewind Desire is an immersive, story-driven RPG that explores the thin line between curiosity and temptation.

The Story Step into the shoes of Faii, a bold and adventurous college student seeking a peaceful escape. Along with her gentle sister, Tawan, she travels to a secluded island paradise for what was supposed to be a simple vacation.

However, the tropical breeze soon carries a sense of unease. As Faii explores the island, she uncovers strange behaviors among the locals, hidden secrets tucked away in the shadows, and a society shaped by deep-rooted desires. Unravel the mystery behind the island, face the heavy consequences of your choices, and discover how far the human mind can be influenced.

Gameplay Features

  • Dynamic Action Combat: Engage in intense third-person, real-time battles. Master fluid combos, strategic dodges, and powerful abilities to overcome the island's mysterious inhabitants.

  • Choice-Driven Narrative: Engage in a deep branching dialogue system. Your responses will determine Faii’s personality, her relationship with her sister Tawan, and the story's ultimate conclusion.

  • Exploration & Investigation: Navigate through a beautiful yet haunting island. Search for environmental clues, solve puzzles, and interact with suspicious NPCs to uncover the dark truth.

  • Character Progression: Enhance Faii’s capabilities through a dedicated skill tree and stat management system, allowing you to unlock new ways to interact with the world and its threats.

  • Multiple Endings: Every choice and every victory carries weight, leading to various distinct endings.

data.short_description: Faii fights to survive on a paradise island consumed by chaos in this single-player action RPG. Explore varied environments, engage in fast-paced combat, complete quests, and upgrade abilities and gear to rescue your sister.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-8700K / AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 64-bit
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 16 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel Core i7-8700K / AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
